# StdioClientTransport.CapturedStderrText method

The captured stderr decoded as UTF-8 text, for convenient inspection (spec §8.4-a/c).

```csharp
public string CapturedStderrText()
```

## Return Value

The captured stderr as a string (replacement chars for any non-UTF-8 bytes — stderr is free-form).
